creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
Author: swills
Date: Sat Mar 29 14:58:31 2014
New Revision: 349532
URL: http://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/349532
QAT: https://qat.redports.org/buildarchive/r349532/

Log:
  Ruby library to define equality, equivalency and hash methods automatically.
  
  WWW: https://github.com/dkubb/equalizer
  
  PR:		ports/187990
  Submitted by:	Michael Moll <kvedulv at kvedulv.de>

Added:
  head/devel/rubygem-equalizer/
  head/devel/rubygem-equalizer/Makefile   (contents, props changed)
  head/devel/rubygem-equalizer/distinfo   (contents, props changed)
  head/devel/rubygem-equalizer/pkg-descr   (contents, props changed)
Modified:
  head/devel/Makefile

Modified: head/devel/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/devel/Makefile	Sat Mar 29 14:56:54 2014	(r349531)
+++ head/devel/Makefile	Sat Mar 29 14:58:31 2014	(r349532)
@@ -4193,6 +4193,7 @@
     SUBDIR += rubygem-edavis10-object_daddy
     SUBDIR += rubygem-elif
     SUBDIR += rubygem-enumerize
+    SUBDIR += rubygem-equalizer
     SUBDIR += rubygem-errand
     SUBDIR += rubygem-eventmachine
     SUBDIR += rubygem-excon

Added: head/devel/rubygem-equalizer/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- /dev/null	00:00:00 1970	(empty, because file is newly added)
+++ head/devel/rubygem-equalizer/Makefile	Sat Mar 29 14:58:31 2014	(r349532)
@@ -0,0 +1,18 @@
+# Created by: Michael Moll <kvedulv at kvedulv.de>
+# $FreeBSD$
+
+PORTNAME=	equalizer
+PORTVERSION=	0.0.9
+CATEGORIES=	devel rubygems
+MASTER_SITES=	RG
+
+MAINTAINER=	ruby@FreeBSD.org
+COMMENT=	Ruby library to define equality methods
+
+LICENSE=	MIT
+
+USE_RUBY=	yes
+USE_RUBYGEMS=	yes
+RUBYGEM_AUTOPLIST=	yes
+
+.include <bsd.port.mk>

Added: head/devel/rubygem-equalizer/distinfo
==============================================================================
--- /dev/null	00:00:00 1970	(empty, because file is newly added)
+++ head/devel/rubygem-equalizer/distinfo	Sat Mar 29 14:58:31 2014	(r349532)
@@ -0,0 +1,2 @@
+SHA256 (rubygem/equalizer-0.0.9.gem) = 992b58dc8892afc3c0bde86cd00349b23f01fb702c295c46dd3bfb4f0574dbc4

Added: head/devel/rubygem-equalizer/pkg-descr
==============================================================================

+++ head/devel/rubygem-equalizer/pkg-descr	Sat Mar 29 14:58:31 2014	(r349532)
@@ -0,0 +1,3 @@
+Ruby library to define equality, equivalency and hash methods automatically.
+
